ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to query Neo4j'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'Neo4j'}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:ASKED]->(u:User {display_name: 'TechExplorer'}),
    p3 = (u)-[r3:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Cypher Best Practices'})-[:ANSWERED]->(q)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the tagging of the "Neo4j" category influence the acceptance rate of answers provided by TechExplorer on their question about querying Neo4j?

cypher:
MATCH (u:User {display_name: "TechExplorer"})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question {title: "querying Neo4j"})
MATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "Neo4j"})
MATCH (a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q)
WITH t, count(a) / count(q) AS acceptanceRate, avg(a.score) AS avgScore
RETURN t.name AS tag, acceptanceRate, avgScore
